resources.string: This app will be hidden from the home screen. You can restore it later from the hidden apps using the button at the bottom of the list
The app installation permission must be granted ahead of time to avoid a bug in the Android 11 system that will negatively affect the user experience
Do you want to add this patch source to Morphe?
Check your internet connection and try again
Your sources are up to date
Add a patch source or enable an existing one in %s
You\'ve hidden all apps from the home screen
What app do you want to patch?
Ready to make apps legendary again?
Want to watch ads? Me neither
Ready to change underwhelming into awesome?
Saving apps from themselves since today
Powered by caffeine and good patches
Good morning! Apps won\'t patch themselves
Good evening! Evening patches hit different
Winding down? Patch an app first
Still up? So are the apps that need patching
At this point, just stay up and patch
You and the servers, both awake
Receives early access to new experimental patch versions
Patches experimental app targets if available
This source has already been added
Invalid source URL. Please check the address and try again
The remote metadata file is unavailable. Patching with the installed bundle still works, but auto-update is disabled for this source
The patch bundle could not be downloaded. The source URL may be incorrect or the file does not exist
A patch source with this name already exists
Could not update this patch source
Delete source \"%s\"? This cannot be undone
Select a .mpp patch source file from storage
URL must point to a GitHub/GitLab repo or .json file
\'%s\' could not be updated. Check your internet connection and try again
Enable Expert mode in Settings to include this patch manually
Need help finding an original unpatched APK?
To patch %s, you need the unpatched APK version:
To patch %s, you need an unpatched APK of versions:
Yes, help me find an APK
No, I already have an APK
No saved APK. Patching will require selecting the APK file again
%1$s has no supported versions for Android %2$d (API %3$d). All declared versions require a higher Android version
Scroll down the webpage and press
Press download on the website, and not here 😊
Great! Now click continue and go to the website 👆
Practice makes perfect and you\'re getting there 💪
Still not here… still not here… 🙈
You are now an official Morphe button tester 🏅
Wait for the download to complete, and do not install the APK
Wait for the download to complete, then install the APK
After the download finishes, return to Morphe
After installing the original APK, return to Morphe
Select the %s APK file you just downloaded
Select an APK file of any app, or pick an app already installed on this device
Could not read the file. Check that \'External Storage\' is not battery restricted
The selected file is not a valid APK
Failed to open the file. Please try again
This feature is only available in Expert mode

"You have selected patches from multiple patch sources. This may cause compatibility issues or unexpected behavior.
Are you sure you want to proceed?"
The APK you selected for %s does not match the expected signing certificate. It may be modified or from an untrusted source
This APK may not be the original
"This file is an APK bundle (APKM / APKS / XAPK). For the best results, this app recommends patching a full APK"
This version has experimental support and may be unstable or incomplete

This version of %s has early experimental support

🔧 Expect quirky app behavior or unidentified bugs as the patches are refined for this app version
This APK is not a recommended app version. Proceeding may result in a non-functional app
This is a different build of the same version. The patches require a specific build
The selected APK is not for the application you intended to patch
Mobile data is active and patch updates are disabled
Patching with outdated patches may result in a broken app
Only %1$.2f GB of free storage available. Patching requires at least %2$.2f GB of free space to work correctly
Proceeding may result in a \"file not found\" error or a corrupt output APK
Image has no transparent pixels. The result may look incorrect
Use a PNG with a transparent background
The foreground must be a PNG file with a transparent background. A solid-colored background will look incorrect - the background color should come from the background picker below.
"Inner zone (solid): content is always fully visible on all launcher shapes. Outer zone (dashed): may be clipped by the launcher mask - keep important details inside the inner zone."
Generated automatically from the foreground image. Adjust its size using the Notification slider. All visible content appears white in the status bar.
Generated automatically from the foreground image using the same adaptive icon transforms. It appears tinted with the wallpaper accent color on Android 13 and later.
Use any image file (PNG or JPEG). For best results, use a wide-format image with an approximately 2.7:1 aspect ratio. PNG files with transparent backgrounds will blend naturally with the app theme.
Most apps require separate images for the light and dark themes. Some apps (such as YouTube Music) only use the dark theme, so only that section is shown.
Use pinch-to-zoom and drag gestures directly in the preview to position and scale your image. Snap guides appear when the image is near the center. You can also use the slider below the preview.
Are you sure you want to uninstall this app?
Your patch selection and options will be preserved for future patching
Original APK not found. Cannot repatch this app
A newer version of patches is available. Repatch your app to get the latest improvements and fixes
This app was uninstalled outside the Morphe. Repatch it to restore functionality
Root mode requires the original APK to be installed on your device before patching
GmsCore support patch is excluded in root mode
Your device has root access. Choose how you want to install the patched app
Mounts the patched APK over the stock app. No GmsCore needed
Installs as a separate app with GmsCore support. An installer can be selected after patching
The installation method determines which patches are included and cannot be changed after patching
This step may take a while. Please wait…
Your app is patched and installed!
You need to uninstall the existing version
The patched app uses a different certificate than the installed version. Uninstalling will erase all app data

"Morphe signs patched apps with its own certificate, which differs from the original. Android requires removing the existing version before the patched app can be installed.
Uninstalling will permanently erase all app data"
Press the button below to install
Press the button below to mount
The bundle %1$s requires patcher version %2$s or newer. Please update Morphe to patch this app
One or more patch options point to paths Morphe cannot read. Grant storage access and tap the button then patching will start automatically
One or more patch options point to paths that cannot be accessed. Update the paths in patch options and try again
Storage permission was denied. Grant the permission to use this path, or move the files to the app\'s private directory
Tip: Move files to /Android/data/app.morphe.manager/files/ - no extra permissions needed
Some devices may stop the patcher when the app is minimized. Allow Morphe to run without battery restrictions to ensure patching completes reliably
Tap to return to the patcher
Are you sure you want to stop the patching process?
Morphing your app into something awesome… 🏆
Giving your app a digital tune-up… 🔧
Look outside, it\'s nice out there… 🌤️
Fixing bugs in the unpatched app… 🪲
Great patches are worth the wait… ⏳
Please remain seated until the captain turns off the \"Patching in progress\" sign… 💺✈️
Cooking up your patched app, hot and fresh… 🍳
All systems nominal… patching trajectory is stable… 🚀
Squeezing out extra power, like juice from a digital lemon… 🍋
Encouraging the app to accept its new, better self… 🌱
Changing the app superposition from unpatched to patched… 📦⚛️
Your app has a fever, and the only prescription is more patches… 🩺🔔
User interaction is required in order to proceed with this plugin
Install the app before opening it
Smooth background shifting when tilting the device
Translations for some languages may be missing or incomplete
To translate new languages or improve the existing translations, visit %s
Show a greeting message on the home screen
Early access to new Morphe app versions. Enable pre-release per source in patch sources
Allows Morphe and patch updates to download over mobile data
Periodically check for updates in the background and notify when available
Push notifications for new releases, even when the app is closed
Background checks may not work reliably on some devices. Manufacturers like Xiaomi, Huawei, Samsung, and OnePlus often aggressively restrict background processes to save battery
Tap to open Morphe and update
Morphe needs notification permission to alert you when updates are available in the background
Would you like to be notified when updates are available?
Notifications about new Morphe and patch releases
Shown while Morphe is patching an app in the background
Enables complex Morphe patching settings and customization options
Expert mode gives more control over how patches are applied, but misconfiguring settings in expert mode can result in a non-functional app
Removes unused CPU architecture libs and split APK modules
Controls how bytecode is processed during patching. Affects patching speed, memory usage, and output APK size
Faster patching and lower memory usage, at the cost of a larger APK. Recommended for low-RAM or older devices
Slower patching, replicates legacy behavior. Recommended only if fast mode causes issues
Set a GitHub Personal Access Token in order to be able to add pull requests as external sources. Create a PAT with scope public_repo github.com
Adds this PAT to exported Morphe settings
Do not share your PAT. If you include it in a settings export, keep that file private because it contains the token
Changing patch options requires re-patching the app to take effect
In Expert mode patch options will be available during the patching process
Can be a hex color (#RRGGBB) or a color resource reference
Wait until the patch source is updated
No options available for this patch

"Folder with images to use as a custom icon.
The folder must contain one or more of the following folders, depending on the DPI of the device: - mipmap-mdpi - mipmap-hdpi - mipmap-xhdpi - mipmap-xxhdpi - mipmap-xxxhdpi
Each of the folders must contain all of the following files: morphe_adaptive_background_custom.png morphe_adaptive_foreground_custom.png
The image dimensions must be as follows: - mipmap-mdpi: 108x108 px - mipmap-hdpi: 162x162 px - mipmap-xhdpi: 216x216 px - mipmap-xxhdpi: 324x324 px - mipmap-xxxhdpi: 432x432 px
Optionally, the path contains a \'drawable\' folder with a monochrome icon file: morphe_adaptive_monochrome_custom.xml
Optionally, the path contains a notification icon in one of the following formats: - XML vector drawable in \'drawable\': morphe_notification_icon_custom.xml - PNG raster images in \'drawable-dpi\' folders: drawable-mdpi/morphe_notification_icon_custom.png (24x24 px) drawable-hdpi/morphe_notification_icon_custom.png (36x36 px) drawable-xhdpi/morphe_notification_icon_custom.png (48x48 px) drawable-xxhdpi/morphe_notification_icon_custom.png (72x72 px) drawable-xxxhdpi/morphe_notification_icon_custom.png (96x96 px)"

"Folder with images to use as a custom header logo.
The folder must contain one or more of the following folders, depending on the DPI of the device: - drawable-hdpi - drawable-xhdpi - drawable-xxhdpi - drawable-xxxhdpi
Each of the folders must contain all of the following files: morphe_header_custom_light.png morphe_header_custom_dark.png
The image dimensions must be as follows: - drawable-hdpi: 194x72 px - drawable-xhdpi: 258x96 px - drawable-xxhdpi: 387x144 px - drawable-xxxhdpi: 512x192 px"
Removes Shorts from launcher long-press menu
Removes Shorts button from launcher widget
Mounts the patched APK over the installed app
Installs silently using Shizuku or Sui
Install Shizuku or Sui to use this option
Start Shizuku or Sui and try again
Grant Shizuku permission to Morphe from the Shizuku app
Your primary installer is set to the rooted mount installer. This saved app was not installed using mount
Stock app version (%2$s) does not match patched app version (%1$s). Mount the matching stock version, then try again
The installed Shizuku version is not supported
The installation failed. Try again or switch to a different installer
Another app with this package name is already installed. Uninstall it before continuing
%s did not confirm the installation. Check the other app and try again
Your preferred installer (%s) is currently unavailable. You can fix the issue and retry, or use the standard installer instead
Make sure Shizuku is running and permission is granted to this app
Shows installer selection dialog each time a patched app is installed
Silently installs the patched APK as soon as patching completes
\"%s\" is enabled - auto-install will be skipped
Keeps the patcher running when the app is minimized
Runs patching in a separate process for better stability
Higher limits speed up patching on capable devices
A low memory limit may cause failures when patching larger apps
This feature requires Android 11 or greater
Imports or exports your signing keystore
You\'ll need enter the keystore\'s credentials to import it
Backs up and restores your Morphe settings
Are you sure you want to delete the saved patched APK for %s?
Saved for repatching. One version per app is kept
Delete original APK for %s? You won\'t be able to repatch without providing a new APK
Saved patch selections, retained after uninstall
This will permanently delete all saved patch selections for all packages and sources
This will permanently delete all saved patch selections for %s across all sources
This will permanently delete saved patch selections for %1$s in source #%2$s
Browse storage with Morphe\'s built-in file picker instead of the system default
An open-source project for modern, streamlined patching of popular Android apps, driven by community feedback and contributions
Check out the latest changes in this update

"You are currently on a metered connection, and data charges from your service provider may apply.
Do you still want to continue?"
Manage your patch sources. Each source provides patches that can be applied to your apps
Swipe right on an app card to view its available patches. Swipe left to hide the card from the home screen
Customize Morphe: appearance, advanced options, and system tools
Tap to view all patches available from this source
Tap the version to view the full changelog for this source
Enable this to receive pre-release patch versions from this source
Customize the app\'s look: theme, accent color, and background
Choose between light, dark, or system theme. You can also pick a custom accent color or enable Dynamic Color
Enable Expert Mode to unlock patch selection, custom options, and other advanced features
Keystore management, import/export tools, and app information
Choose how patched apps are installed: standard, root mount, or Shizuku
Run patching in a separate process to improve stability and control memory usage. Recommended for large apps
Enable to use the built-in file browser instead of the system picker when selecting APKs or keystores
Want a quick tour of Morphe\'s key features?
Take a guided tour of Morphe\'s key features
